bio: In just a few short years, rapper Playboi Carti has amassed over 19B streams worldwide. Carti has been unstoppable since the release of his 2017 single “Magnolia,” as its meteoric rise garnered cosigns from Beyoncé and features on series like Atlanta.

rows: Popular (with Playboi Carti & Madonna) - From The Idol Vol. 1 (Music from the HBO Original Series)
